name: Hype List
description: A shared bucket list of match-day plans that springs in and out with motion.
features: Add an item to a shared list; rows spring in and fade out with motion/react
Tap feedback (whileTap) on the add button
Each item shows its author username
Authors can remove their own items with an animated exit

storage.meaning: in-progress text so it survives a reload

ui.layout: single card with an input and an animated list

acceptance: New items animate in with an AnimatePresence spring keyed by doc id
Removing an own item animates it out
Only the author sees a delete control on their rows
